host-text.label: Host language model
host-text.toolHint: Use the current Codex host model for briefs, scripts, prompts, and storyboard text.

manual-text.label: Imported text
manual-text.toolHint: Place an authored or externally generated text file at the request output path, then register it with provider:record.

host-image.label: Host image generation
host-image.toolHint: Use an installed image-generation skill or tool, then register the resulting local file with provider:record.

manual-image.label: Imported image
manual-image.toolHint: Place an authorized image at the request output path, then register it with provider:record.

host-voice.label: Host fictional voice
host-voice.toolHint: Use an installed fictional catalog TTS skill or tool, then register the resulting local file with provider:record.

manual-voice.label: Imported narration
manual-voice.toolHint: Place an authorized narration file at the request output path, then register it with provider:record.
